args.content:
# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

## Clothing
- Swimwear (2-3 sets)
- Beach cover-ups
- Flip-flops/sandals
- Hiking shoes/boots
- Casual outfits (t-shirts, shorts, sundresses)
- Light sweater or jacket (for cooler evenings)
- Sleepwear
- Undergarments and socks
- Hat/cap for sun protection
- Sunglasses

## Beach & Water Activities
- Reef-safe sunscreen (SPF 30 or higher)
- After-sun lotion (aloe vera)
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Beach towel/quick-dry towel
- Waterproof phone case
- Dry bag for electronics
- Water bottle

## Hiking & Outdoor Gear
- Daypack/backpack
- Water-resistant jacket
- Hiking poles (optional)
- Headlamp/flashlight
- Insect repellent

## Electronics
- Camera with extra memory cards and batteries
- Phone and charger
- Universal power adapter (if needed)
- Portable power bank
- Headphones/earbuds

## Toiletries & Personal Items
- Toothbrush and toothpaste
- Shampoo and conditioner
- Body wash
- Razor and shaving supplies
- Hairbrush/comb
- Makeup and makeup remover
- Feminine hygiene products
- Prescription medications
- First-aid kit (band-aids, antiseptic, pain relievers)
- Motion sickness medication (if needed)

## Documents & Money
- Passport (if required)
- Driver's license
- Flight tickets/itinerary
- Hotel reservation details
- Travel insurance documents
- Credit cards and cash (some US dollars)
- Emergency contact information

## Special Items for Activities
- Binoculars (for wildlife viewing)
- Waterproof watch
- Journal and pen
- Guidebook about Hawaii
- Small gifts for the luau (if participating in cultural exchange)

## For the Spa Day
- Swimsuit (if spa has pool/hot tub)
- Flip-flops
- Hair tie

## For Shopping
- Reusable shopping bag
- List of items to purchase

Safe travels to Hawaii!
